company.zh: 东莞市鲸纬科技有限公司

description.en: Designing and developing scalable microservice architectures with Java and Spring Boot. Leading LLM integration initiatives for enterprise applications, building AI-powered Agent systems that transform traditional backend workflows.
description.zh: -AI Workflow搭建：基于 Dify 搭建智能大模型工作流，针对海运单证多文本、多噪声的特点，设计基于锚点定位与正则表达式相结合的 OCR 抽取提示词，解决传统正则无法分离类似 doc_no 等高相似度内容的痛点，以及进行系统基础开发
